name: cookidoo-recipes
description: Search Cookidoo recipes, inspect official details, translate recipes, and save custom recipes through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Search, translate, and save Cookidoo recipes.
interface.longDescription: Local Cookidoo MCP server and skill for recipe search, recipe details, translation workflows, image copying, and custom recipe creation.
defaultPrompt: Find Cookidoo recipes for a dinner idea.
Translate this Cookidoo recipe and save it.
